achievement.name: First Victory
achievement.description: Beat The Attic for the first time.

achievement.name: The Roof
achievement.description: Unlock The Roof for the first time.

achievement.name: Stella
achievement.description: Beat The Attic for the first time.

achievement.name: Is This the End?
achievement.description: Beat The Roof for the first time.
achievement.unlocks: Playdough Shotgun, Playdough, Playdough Cake, Playdough Shield

achievement.name: Secrets of the Arsonists
achievement.description: Beat The Roof for the second time.

achievement.name: Roof Runner
achievement.description: Beat The Roof for the third time.

achievement.name: Above the Edge
achievement.description: Beat The Roof for the fourth time.

achievement.name: Cracked Ceiling
achievement.description: Beat The Roof for the fifth time.

achievement.name: Final Ascent
achievement.description: Beat The Roof for the ninth time.

achievement.name: Skybreaker
achievement.description: Beat The Roof for the tenth time.
